description: User dwells on the initial screen with the cursor positioned over a browser tab.
frame_description: A dark screen with an 'Open' button in the center and a small video feed in the top right.

description: The browser navigates to the Flight Centre homepage, as seen by the URL change in the address bar.
frame_description: The URL bar updates to flightcentre.com.au while the page begins to load.

description: The Flight Centre homepage loads, transitioning from skeleton placeholders to full content including the search widget and promotional banners.
page_title: Flight Centre | Your centre for travel
frame_description: Visual progression of the website loading from empty containers to a fully rendered homepage.

description: User dwells on the Flight Centre homepage while it finishes loading and becomes interactive, with the cursor remaining stationary.
page_title: Flight Centre | Your centre for travel
frame_description: The user waits for the search widget to populate and the page to become fully interactive.
